item.title: Procedural Dungeon Generator
item.description: A React/TypeScript application that generates randomized dungeon layouts using Binary Space Partitioning algorithms. Features corridor carving, room placement, and interactive visualization of the generation process.

item.title: Barnacles Beers and Brawls
item.description: A capstone game project for class of 2024 at University of Utah.

item.title: Image Feature Matching and Stitching
item.description: Implements Harris corner detection, feature matching, image warpping and image stitching

item.title: Gravisite
item.description: A semester long team project for traditional game dev course at the University of Utah.
